title: Candy
overview: Crescent and Corona draw portraits of Funny, but she throws away Crescent's, while rewarding Corona with a candy stick. Crescent becomes jealous of the affection Funny is giving Corona, so he attempts to steal the candy stick from him.

title: Hunting
overview: Crescent and Corona are hungry but Funny is too tired to feed them so they go out to hunt some food for themselves. Unfortunately, their attempts to catch the clever owl rats end up taking a turn for the worse.

title: Cabbage
overview: Crescent draws a face on a cabbage, much to Funny's delight. However, Corona becomes fed up with them treating the cabbage better than him, so he tries to get rid of it.

title: Black Hole
overview: Funny and Crescent discover that Corona has a black hole inside his mouth.

title: Ghost
overview: Crescent chokes to death on an apple and comes back as a ghost.

title: Picture Book
overview: Crescent discovers a live whale inside Funny's picture book.

title: Rainbow
overview: Funny and the aliens drive to see a rainbow up close, but they soon find out that it is no ordinary rainbow.

title: Flight
overview: Funny and the aliens become trapped on an air balloon as it descends to the ground, leaving them to face certain death unless they escape.

title: Birthday
overview: Crescent becomes depressed when no one will eat the birthday cake he made for Funny.

title: Three Matches
overview: Crescent crashes his car, leaving he, Funny, Corona, and the owl rats stranded in the middle of the cold desert, with nothing but three matches to keep them warm.

title: Photograph
overview: Crescent is upset that he can never seem to make it into a picture, so he puts Corona in danger for the sake of Funny taking the perfect photo.

title: Circle
overview: Crescent decides that shaping his head into a circle like Corona's is the best way to win Funny's affection.
